absorb_workflow.source: sz absorb draft plus deterministic protocol adapter

behaviors: read repo profile goals and registry state
combine module health, dirty-file count, and recent events
write a concise preamble payload for the next operator session
public_purpose: Generates a compact start-preamble from current session and reference-stack state.
reconstruction: Protocol-native behavior was re-derived from the source candidate and hardened into an anonymized System Zero module.
source_summary: Compatibility wrapper for the canonical session bootstrap runtime.
